## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (skill or context doc was wrong / outdated)
- [ ] New skill (workflow)
- [ ] New context doc (knowledge)
- [ ] New vertical or example notebook

## Verification

<!-- How did you verify this change is correct? -->
- [ ] If updating an SDK / PQL claim, verified against current source (cite repo + version)
- [ ] If adding a new skill, followed the template in `meta/skills/add-skill.md`
- [ ] If adding a context doc, followed the template in `meta/skills/add-context-doc.md`
- [ ] Tested with at least one coding tool (Claude Code / Codex / Cursor) end-to-end
